
I have question how to call properly inject block and inject protocol api methods which I have found here? https://gitlab.com/tezos/tezos/-/blob/master/docs/api/rpc-openapi.json I was searching but I did not found any relevant documentation how to create data which I will fill into the API. Is there any guide how to create following input for the inject block methods? curl --location 'https://02-dallas-051-01.rpc.tatum.io/injection/block' \ --header 'Content-Type: application/json' \ --header 'Authorization: Basic xxx' \ --data '{ "data": "oorMJvcNv9338GGKGLTsM5EhCr96VuiLbE3yLLhT3myKa82QVdt", "operations": [ [ { "branch": "BMPvGANiByxUeTkMJM1LtkEUNapeMcTjxuEAr9crBZdaYwbQX6a", "data": "" } ] ] }' Response Failed to parse the request body: Unhandled error Invalid_argument("Hex.to_char: 111 is an invalid char") For instance I was able to inject operation bytes and send it correctly: async function sendTezos() { // Instantiate a new TezosToolkit instance const Tezos = new TezosToolkit('https://02-dallas-051-01.rpc.tatum.io'); // Set the signer Tezos.setProvider({ signer: await InMemorySigner.fromSecretKey('edskRePSfPsrezMnp78MVZv4iWYNTK5qeZuUVqFLZiDC8yCzDLpWesmMhzddG4LLfvx3UHKpLL8WCbLv8RX1R7CjBpjDzYxDS7') }); // Create and inject the operation const op = await Tezos.contract.transfer({ to: 'tz1Rwf9HHTrCEMjE5CwYdfTF3yYvuw6ip11c', amount: 1 // amount is in tez }); console.log(op.raw.opOb.contents) console.log(op) // Await confirmation // await op.confirmation(); } sendTezos() curl --location 'https://02-dallas-051-01.rpc.tatum.io/injection/operation' \ --header 'Content-Type: application/json' \ --header 'Authorization: Basic xxx' \ --data '""'
